import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', templateUrl: './app.component.html', styleUrls: ['./app.component.css'] }) export class AppComponent { title = 'Mar 2025 Financial Dashboard'; menuOpen = false; toggleMenu() { this.menuOpen = !this.menuOpen; } closeMenu() { this.menuOpen = false; } }
